---
title: "Groundwater Markets"
author: "John Robin Inston"
date: "2026-02-12"
date-modified: "2026-02-12"
toc: true
title-block-banner: true
categories: [Groundwater, Financial Markets, Stochastic Games, Research]
listing:
- id: posts
  contents:
    - "../../../posts/*/index.qmd"
  include:
    categories: [Groundwater]
  sort: date desc
  type: default
  grid-columns: 4
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, image, date]
  max-items: 4
  image-height: "200"
---

## 💦 Project Information

On this page you can find information about my contribution to the project
jointly lead by [Prof. Mike Ludkovski](https://ludkovski.pstat.ucsb.edu) (UC
Santa Barbara) and [Igor Cialenco](https://www.iit.edu/directory/people/igor-cialenco) 
(Illinois Institute of Technology) modelling groundwater markets as 
finite agent stochastic games.  

## 🔬 Publications



## 📝 Related Posts

::: {#posts}
:::

[See all &rarr;](../posts){.about-links .subtitle}
